originalProbes.title: PS2418L0 UUV Swarm acquisition demo
originalProbes.abstract: Demonstration UxS acquisition for swarm import QA: UUV hydrography in the Gulf of Mexico with CTD and ADCP, May 2024.
originalProbes.purpose: Validate catalog-ready metadata assembly for Navy UxS templates in the metadata pilot.
originalProbes.supplementalInformation: Synthetic-but-valid values for automated swarm audit.
originalProbes.metadataStandardName: ISO 19115-2 Geographic Information - Metadata - Part 2: Extensions for Imagery and Gridded Data
